Text.Page:
The {@LinkCreature:19#3003#reaping} and {@LinkCreature:19#3001#berserk harvester golems} are getting close to the village. Push them back a bit, will you?

Oh, and bring me any of those crystal hearts you find inside them. I'm curious about what they do.

I'm hoping that without these hearts, they won't be able to reanimate. Maybe I can even make some use of them.

Thanks so much.
Those golems are getting too close for comfort.
